_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Unexpectedly, we found the presence of small micrometastases in HuR-overexpressing normal Schwann cell lines (1 of 4)
details: Small micrometastases found in HuR-overexpressing normal Schwann cell lines (1 of 4)
